email.subject: IT Password Reset Required
email.body:
Dear Alex Meier,

Our records show your password will expire today. Reset it now to avoid being locked out of your account.

Please act immediately: [Reset Password Now](https://contoso.account-verify.com/login)

Thank you,
Billing Department

scoring.suggested_difficulty_tier: easy (many obvious flags -- good for beginner training)

email.subject: Action Required: Verify Your Account Access
email.body:
Dear User,

We noticed unusual sign-in activity on your account. To keep your account secure, please verify your identity immediately.

Please act immediately: [Verify Account](https://contoso.account-verify.com/login)

Thank you,
Billing Department

email.subject: Invoice Payment Overdue
email.body:
Dear Customer,

Your recent invoice payment has failed to process. Please update your payment details before your service is suspended.

Please act today: [Verify Account](https://contoso.account-verify.com/login)

Thank you,
Billing Department
